birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species occurs in the eastern Pacific from the islands in Baja California to the Galápagos Islands and the Isla de la Plata in Ecuador and Malpelo in Colombia.{{Cite journal|last1=Pitman|first1=Robert L.|last2=Jehl|first2=Joseph R.|last3=Joseph L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-and-white tyrannulet has a disjunct distribution It is found in southwestern Ecuador on the Isla de la Plata and Isla Puná, on the mainland in Guayas and Loja provinces, and with a single record in Manabí Province
